content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Triangles on a Rectangle". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1620/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and m, the dimensions of the rectangle. The second line contains two integers x1 and y1, the coordinates of the first point. The third line contains two integers x2 and y2, the coordinates of the second point. The fourth line contains two integers x3 and y3, the coordinates of the third point.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print 'YES' if the three points form a triangle that is inside the rectangle, otherwise print 'NO'.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check if the three points are inside the rectangle and if they form a triangle by checking the area of the triangle formed by the three points.
